story.description: A clip of weather, clouds, storms, lightning, snow, or sky phenomena: clouds on sky
story.hook: Storm clouds show air layers changing over time.
story.lead: Storm clouds show air layers changing over time. Watch the cloud deck, because winds at different heights can push each layer in a different direction. A timelapse turns that invisible motion into a map. Which sky motion should we read next?
story.script: Storm clouds show air layers changing over time. Watch the cloud deck, because winds at different heights can push each layer in a different direction. A timelapse turns that invisible motion into a map. Which sky motion should we read next?

story.description: A clip of Earth, atmosphere, clouds, storms, or landscapes seen from above: stunning aerial view of scandinavian beach
story.hook: Storm clouds show where a storm is feeding.
story.lead: Storm clouds show where a storm is feeding. Watch the spiral shape, because warm ocean air rises near the center and releases heat as clouds build. Rotation organizes that energy into bands. From above, the storm is not random; it is an engine. Which satellite clue next?
story.script: Storm clouds show where a storm is feeding. Watch the spiral shape, because warm ocean air rises near the center and releases heat as clouds build. Rotation organizes that energy into bands. From above, the storm is not random; it is an engine. Which satellite clue next?
